lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Hello citizen, how can I help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any quests for me?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: I don't know if you can help us!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: The trolls have taken up camp on Death Plateau! They are using it to launch raids at night on the village. We have tried to attack the camp but the main path is heavily guarded!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Perhaps there is a way you can sneak up at night?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: If there is another way I do not know of it.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Do you know of such a path?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No but perhaps I could try and find one?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Citizen you would be well rewarded!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: If you go up to Death Plateau be very careful as the trolls will attack you on sight!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be careful.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: One other thing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's that?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: All of our equipment is kept in the castle on the hill.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: The stupid guard that was on duty last night lost the combination to the lock! I told the Prince that the Imperial Guard should've been in charge of security!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No problem, what does the combination look like?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: The equipment room is unlocked when the stone balls are placed in the correct order on the stone mechanism outside it. The right order is written on a piece of paper the guard had.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A stone what...?!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Well citizen, the Prince is fond of puzzles. Why he couldn't just have a key is beyond me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll get on it right away!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, sorry.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Never mind citizen.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Can I assist you with anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Welcome to Principality of Burthorpe!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: We are the Imperial Guard for his Royal Highness Prince Anlaf of Burthorpe.

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Can I assist you with anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You can't, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Welcome back friend!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How goes your fight with the trolls?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: I'm afraid I have bad news. We made our attack as planned, but we met unexpected resistance.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: We were ambushed by trolls coming from the north. They captured Dunstan's son, Godric, who we enlisted at your request, we tried to follow but we were repelled at the foot of their stronghold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything I can do to help?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: The way tto the stronghold is treacherous, friend. Even if you manage to climb your way up, there will be many trolls defending the stronghold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll get Godric back!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: God speed friend! I would send some of my me with you, but none of them are brave enough to follow.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry to hear that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you about Denulth!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: God speed friend!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: Welcome back friend!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How goes your fight with the trolls?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: We are busy preparing for an attack by night. Godric knows of a secret entrance to the stronghold. Once we destroy the stronghold Burthorpe will be safe! Friend, we are indebted to you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good luck!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought the White Knights controlled Asgarnia?

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: You are right citizen. The White Knights have taken advantage of the old and weak king, they control most of Asgarnia, including Falador. However they do not control Burthorpe!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: We are the prince's elite troops! We keep Burthorpe secure!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: The White Knights have overlooked us, until now! They are pouring money into their war against the Black Knights, they are looking for an excuse to stop our funding and I'm afraid they may have found it!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: If we can not destroy the troll camp on Death Plateau then the Imperial Guard will be disbanded and Burthorpe will come under control of the White Knights. We can not let this happen!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you about Denulth!

lines.speaker: Denulth
lines.text: God speed friend!
